resources.string: Core, mode, IPv6 and current config
Ports, DNS hijack and resource limits
Theme, blur, nav bar and scaling
This will clear WebView cache and cookies. Continue?
You have unsaved changes that will be lost.
This app is for research and learning purposes only. It may change device network behavior. You are responsible for how you use it and for complying with local laws and rules.
I have read and agree to the terms above
Required. Used to control Box service and apply system network rules.
Root denied. Please grant in root manager.
Optional. Only requested when you enable notification-related features.
Optional. Used for app list allow/block rules. On some systems, you need to manually grant "installed apps list" access in system settings.
Optional. Location / Nearby devices permissions may be required for scanning nearby Wi‑Fi and hotspots.

On the Home page, the service status card contains a small panel on the right where you can switch Core, Mode, and IPv6 (requires the service to be stopped).

In Network Control:
- Tap the icon before a row to scan nearby Wi‑Fi. Or scan devices connected to your hotspot

It is recommended to stop the service before updating.

Tools:
- Update Core / Subscription / WebUI / CNIP: tap the right icon to download updates

Settings:
- Check for module updates at the module version
You can change these later in Settings
You can set the following optional permissions later
This app requires root access to control Box service.
Service is stopped. Start service to view real-time CPU and RAM metrics.
Customize name and URL for latency tests
Make dark theme backgrounds pure black
On: translucent glass. Off: blur only.
Enable liquid glass and backdrop blur effects
Use floating pill with glass blur effects
Spring-based page transitions, faster and more fluid
Use Maple Mono CN monospace font for log content
On: glass blur. Off: solid background.
Auto start Box service on boot
Export / import module and app rules
You are already up to date
To apply settings correctly, go back to this page, tap the download/update icon on the right of the item, then restart the service.
Only apply rules for specific SSIDs/BSSIDs
Applies to both SSID list and router MAC (BSSID) list
Apply on all SSIDs except listed ones
Used for Wi‑Fi matching (router MAC address / BSSID)
Permission required to scan nearby Wi-Fi
Please turn on Location to scan nearby Wi-Fi
Switch selector targets directly from Clash API
CNIP bypass requires ipset support. Go to Home → System card to check ipset status.
Log content is updating in real time
Live updates paused, manual content refresh only
Create a new folder in the current directory
Are you sure you want to delete "%1$s"?
This will delete the folder and all its contents.
Download a config file from a remote URL
Create a new config file to get started
You have unsaved changes. Tap the save button to apply.
Settings saved. Restart the service to apply changes.
Failed to restart the service to apply app rules
After saving app rules, restart the service for changes to take effect.
You have unsaved changes. Save first, then restart the service.
Auto-select apps based on a simple heuristic for the current mode. This will update your current app selection list.
Go to Tools / Subscription to configure
You are using the latest version
You are using the latest app build
This is a prerelease version for testing and debugging. The app is based on the latest prerelease build.
Monitor connectivity and restart on failure
Restart core when CPU exceeds threshold
Restart core on a cron schedule
Clear log file on each restart
Remove injected firewall REJECT rules on startup
Personal access token for GitHub API
Switch to Code mode to edit servers
